历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 17568 → 53252 → 38868 → 29989 → 38862. In 2022–2023, the separate enrollment group for Nursing lowered the school line; after the 2024 new college entrance exam reform, the ranking rebounded to about 29989, then fell back to about 38862 in 2025. In the recent 3 years (2023–2025), rankings fluctuated within the 3.0–3.9 million range, with a 2025 baseline of about 38862; from 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plans for Physics Category (including Science) were 2612 → 2621 → 2491 → 2640 → 2644 students, generally stable within the 2500–2650 range. In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 2105 students and the Medical Category plan is 611 students (all Medical Category targeted at Physics Category examinees), totaling 2716 students, an increase of about 72 students (+2.7%) compared to 2025, with an expansion rate greater than the recent average, which alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Ranking has steadily risen in recent years: 2021 78th → 2022 75th → 2023 69th → 2024 71st → 2025 73rd → 2026 74th, overall within the national top 80, firmly first in the province; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive: Nanchang University men's volleyball team won the championship in the 2025–2026 CUVA University Volleyball League, and the school actively responded to competition controversies, presenting a good image; the 2025 reputation was neutral/mixed, and in 2023 there was a slightly negative signal due to comparison of admission cutoffs but with limited impact. Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall ranking 43), short video platform exposure is moderately high, and application attention has increased. No obvious admission cutoff gaps were recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering was rated A+ (top in the country), the only A-class discipline at the school; other B+ disciplines include Materials Science and Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Chemistry. Majors such as Food Science and Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology are directly related to advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates in related directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, closely matching Nanchang University's Physics Category enrollment majors, boosting application popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Jiangxi Province is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (about 472,500); the estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 267,800, an increase of about 0.5% from 2025 (266,400). Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, and is the only 211 university in the province, with a very high proportion of provincial enrollment (about 2600 students in Physics Category in recent years, accounting for about 70% of the school's total plan). Provincial candidates have strong willingness to apply, with significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of about 38862, the 2026 Physics Category expansion of about 2.7% (competition relief), a slight increase of about 0.5% in provincial candidates (slightly intensified competition), a slightly positive school reputation, and continuously rising popularity of engineering majors (increased application heat), the relief effect of expansion slightly outweighs the intensifying effects of candidate increase and rising popularity. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 39547, with a range of 39047–40047.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 38500), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors like Computer Science; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 40000), you should prioritize Tier 3 safety majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 3271→3656→8065→6698→4325. In 2023, the separate nursing enrollment group lowered the school line to 8065th place. After the 2024 new college entrance exam reform, the ranking rebounded to about 6698, and further recovered to about 4325 in 2025. In the recent two years (2024–2025), the ranking moved forward from 6698 to 4325, showing a clear upward trend, with a 2025 baseline of about 4325. From 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plans for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were 432→483→426→501→486 students respectively, fluctuating within the 430–500 range. The 2026 History Category plan is 487 students, essentially unchanged (+1) from 2025 (486 students), and the stable plan has a minor impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have steadily risen in recent years, ranking 74th nationally in 2026, and firmly first in the province. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive: the men's volleyball championship increased the school's visibility, and the school actively responded to various public opinions, demonstrating management transparency. The 2025 reputation was neutral/mixed. Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall rank 43), and application attention has increased. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. Food Science and Engineering (A+) is the only A-level discipline, which does not directly map to History Category majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, etc.), but the school's overall strength still attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is divided and wait-and-see (strong advantage for civil service exams), Chinese Language/Chinese Literature is recommended (common for civil service and graduate exams), Education/Teacher Training is divided and wait-and-see. The overall popularity of liberal arts hot majors is stable and slightly recommended. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Jiangxi Province is about 474,900, with History Category candidates estimated at about 207,100, an increase of about 0.5% compared to 2025 (206,100). Nanchang University is the only 211 university in the province, with a provincial History Category enrollment of about 480–500 students, exerting strong geographical appeal to local liberal arts candidates, and application willingness is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of about 4325, the 2026 enrollment plan being essentially unchanged, a slight increase of about 0.5% in provincial History Category candidates (slightly intensified competition), a slightly positive school reputation, and stable liberal arts major popularity, it is predicted that the 2026 minimum admission ranking will move slightly forward compared to 2025 (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is about 4300, with a range of 3800–4800.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南昌大学是江西省唯一的211工程重点建设大学，同时也是国家双一流建设高校，属于综合性大学。其医学部在省内具有领先地位，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业办学历史悠久 ，综合实力在江西省内医学类院校中位居前列。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续较高，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。南昌大学地处江西省会南昌市，作为本省考生报考医学类院校的重要选择，其医学类招生 规模较大（600余人），覆盖临床、口腔、麻醉、影像、预防、药学、护理等多个方向，2026年新增老年医学与健康、智能医学工程等专业，进一步丰富了专业选择。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型及历年位次趋势，预测2026年南昌大学医学类最低录取位次约为38859名，波动区间预计在38470至39248名之间。较2025年位次（38862）基本持平略降（位 次数字减小1名，表示竞争略加剧），主要受2026年医学类缩招约3%的影响，同时考虑到医学类位次在39000附近的历史支撑位，整体波动幅度有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum ranking for Medicine was 17568 (plan: 667 students), in 2022 it was 16891 (plan: 696), in 2023 it was 39009 (plan: 634), in 2024 it was 30000 (plan: 636), and in 2025 it was 38862 (plan: 630). In 2026, the enrollment plan for Medicine is 611 students, a decrease of 19 students from 2025, a reduction of about 3.0%. Looking at historical trends, the rankings in 2023 and 2025 were both around 39000, indicating strong support for Medicine admission rankings in this range; in 2024, there was a significant rebound to 30000, reflecting some annual volatility.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is the only 211 Project key construction university in Jiangxi Province, and it is also a national Double First-Class construction university, belonging to a comprehensive university. Its Medical College holds a leading position within the province, with core majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology having a long history of operation, and its overall strength ranks among the top medical institutions in Jiangxi Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has remained high, with intense competition for core majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang, the capital of Jiangxi Province, and is an important choice for local candidates applying to medical schools. Its medical enrollment scale is large (over 600 students), covering multiple directions including Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Anesthesiology, Medical Imaging, Preventive Medicine, Pharmacy, and Nursing. In 2026, new majors such as Geriatric Medicine and Health, and Intelligent Medical Engineering have been added, further enriching the range of options.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Nanchang University Medicine in 2026 is approximately 38859, with a fluctuation range expected between 38470 and 39248. Compared to the 2025 ranking (38862), it is essentially flat with a slight decrease (ranking number decreases by 1, indicating slightly increased competition), mainly due to the approximately 3% reduction in Medicine enrollment in 2026. Considering the historical support level around 39000 for Medicine rankings, the overall fluctuation range is limited.

Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are the most competitive, requiring a ranking within 13000 for a higher chance; majors such as Preventive Medicine, Pharmacy, and Rehabilitation Therapy have relatively lower admission rankings, suitable for candidates with rankings in the middle to lower part of the predicted range.
